ClusterIdentifier.description: The cluster identifier. Required when connecting to a provisioned cluster. Mutually exclusive with WorkgroupName.

Database.description: The name of the database to run the SQL statement against

DbUser.description: The database user name. Required when authenticating with temporary credentials from GetClusterCredentials.

SecretArn.description: The ARN of the secret stored in AWS Secrets Manager that contains the database credentials. Mutually exclusive with DbUser and temporary credentials.

Sql.description: The SQL statement to run. Maximum length is 100,000 characters.

StatementName.description: A name for the SQL statement. This name can be used to identify the query in the ListStatements output.

WithEvent.description: Whether to send an event to Amazon EventBridge when the SQL statement completes. Default is false.

WorkgroupName.description: The serverless workgroup name. Required when connecting to Redshift Serverless. Mutually exclusive with ClusterIdentifier.

Parameters.description: Named parameters for the SQL statement. Use :name syntax in the SQL string to reference parameters.

ClientToken.description: A unique, case-sensitive identifier to ensure idempotency of the request.
